status_notes: Freely available; English versions confirmed working, no blocks.
official_name: Japan Institute for Promotion of Digital Economy and Community
alternate_names: Japan Information Processing and Development Corporation (historical name)
notes: Operates the PrivacyMark certification system. English-facing sites: english.jipdec.or.jp and privacymark.org.

match_nodes.description: PrivacyMark (P Mark) — Japan's privacy/PII-management trust-mark certification

data.notes: Based on JIS Q 15001:2017 (Personal Information Protection Management System — Requirements). Certification issued via JIPDEC or 19 designated assessment bodies (e.g. Japan Data Communications Association, Japan Federation of Printing Industries). Running since April 1, 1998; approximately 17,700+ certified entities as of mid-2026 per aggregated Japanese-language sources. Japan's privacy/PII-management trust mark, roughly analogous in role to an ISO 27701/privacy-management certification, relevant to data-protection compliance for cloud services handling personal information in Japan.
